title: Rebase alembic down_revision at merge time to prevent multi-head failures across parallel batches

steps.description: Database: add BatchItemStatus.migration_rebase_failed (Python + PG enum via ALTER TYPE in autocommit block), relax ck_pending_migration_log_phase to 4 values (dry_run/apply/rollback/rebase), add pending_migration_log.old_revision TEXT NULL column, update docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md

Review S01: ALTER TYPE uses autocommit_block() + IF NOT EXISTS (CR-00019 precedent), CHECK recreate is atomic, downgrade restores 3-value CHECK + drops column, enum-label dormant-orphan trade-off documented, migration round-trips cleanly on testcontainer

Backend: new orch/daemon/migration_rebase.py module — RebaseResult dataclass, Rewrite dataclass, run_pre_merge_rebase(batch_id, worktree_path, repo_root) that fetches main, rebases branch, identifies batch's own migration files via git diff --diff-filter=A, parses them with regex (not importlib), rewrites stale down_revision preserving quote style, commits with chore(migration-rebase) message, writes PendingMigrationLog(phase='rebase') rows with old_revision, emits DaemonEvent(event_type='migration_rebase') with preflight metadata. Idempotent when no rewrite needed. Internal exceptions (GitCommandError, MigrationParseError, RebaseChainError) caught and converted to RebaseResult(success=False)

Review S03: module shape mirrors migration_pipeline.py, DaemonEvent always emitted (incl. no-op case), subprocess uses shell=False + timeout + check=False, regex preserves quote style + comments, no importlib of migration files, chain-root detection correct, PendingMigrationLog written with phase='rebase' + old_revision + event_metadata= kwarg (not metadata=), commit message exact format, rebase --abort on conflict, AC1-AC4 covered by local unit tests

Backend wiring: orch/db/safe_migrate.py — dry_run() + _build_alembic_config() accept optional script_location, _write_migration_log accepts phase='rebase' + old_revision; orch/daemon/migration_pipeline.py — run_pre_merge_dry_run(batch_id, worktree_path=None) threads script_location=f'{wt}/orch/db/migrations'; orch/daemon/merge_queue.py — insert run_pre_merge_rebase before Phase 1, set status=migration_rebase_failed on failure (queue NOT frozen), pass worktree_path into run_pre_merge_dry_run. All signatures backward-compatible for operator CLI callers

Review S05: backward compat holds for all operator entry points (safe_migrate.dry_run with no kwargs, run_pre_merge_dry_run without worktree_path, _write_migration_log without old_revision), rebase phase wired before Phase 1 with correct guard (isinstance batch_id int), queue-not-frozen on rebase fail and dry-run fail (only rollback fail freezes), DaemonEvent on rebase fail uses event_type='migration_pipeline' (reused) not a new type, worktree_path threading correct path-join

Tests: tests/unit/daemon/test_migration_rebase.py (full AC1-AC4 + parse failure + fetch failure + log write + daemon event), tests/unit/daemon/test_migration_pipeline.py (worktree_path threading + backward compat), tests/unit/daemon/test_safe_migrate.py (script_location override + old_revision persistence), tests/integration/test_parallel_migrations.py (AC6: two disjoint-column batches merge linearly), tests/integration/test_migration_rebase_conflict.py (AC7: same-column conflict → rebase rewrites but dry-run fails, main untouched, queue not frozen). Deterministic revision IDs (rev1/revA/revB), real git + testcontainer in integration, no DB mocking in integration

Review S07: explicit AC1-AC7 coverage map, assertions are real (file content, git log, DB row contents, linear alembic chain) not proxies, no DB mocks in integration, testcontainer URL psycopg replacement applied, FTS DDL run where schema is built, fixture isolation (tmp_path + fresh schema), failure paths assert rebase --abort evidence not just result.success=False, regression coverage for backward-compat call sites

Docs: docs/IW_AI_Core_Daemon_Design.md — new 'Phase 0: Pre-merge rebase' subsection with 4-step flow diagram + failure-matrix update; docs/IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md — polish narrative for the 3 schema deltas S01 added; CLAUDE.md — Quick Navigation row for migration_rebase.py; orch/CLAUDE.md — Daemon Modules row for migration_rebase.py. Verify every code reference resolves (paths, symbols, behaviour)

Final cross-layer review: trace AC1-AC7 end-to-end through schema → module → wiring → tests → docs. Verify queue-not-frozen for both new failure states, backward compat at operator CLI, worktree_commit.sh rebase step is now a no-op (read the bash to confirm no changes needed), scope gate not bypassed by the rebase commit, no regression to CR-00017 paths. Full test suite (unit + integration) must pass
